_comment: NodePilot Tech-Demo XL — 3-swim-lane showcase. ~106 nodes, ~170 edges. LANE TOP (y=300) Discovery: triggers + host collect + 12 remote fan-out + 10 operator branches. LANE MID (y=900) Processing: REST/SQL + XML/JSON + forEach + sub-workflows + retry-NofM + 10 deep operator combos. LANE BOT (y=1500) Ops: timing demo + remote-ops + email + power-abort + debug zone + 8 deep operator combos + cleanup. Sync bands at x=1960 (sync1) and via top-delay-phase3 (sync2), final-junction at x=10000. All 19 activity types, all 14 edge operators + AND/OR/NOT, all 3 junction modes, breakpoints, disabled nodes, disabled edges, retry policies, error paths, sub-workflow calls. Bounds: 0..10720 x 0..1920.

config.query: SELECT id FROM queue WHERE processed = 0

config.message: Tech-Demo XL started: env={{trg-manual.param.environment}} iter={{trg-manual.param.iteration}} dryRun={{trg-manual.param.dryRun}}

config.script:
$iteration   = '{{trg-manual.param.iteration}}'
$iterationNum = [int]$iteration
$severity    = if ($iterationNum -ge 5) { 'high' } elseif ($iterationNum -ge 2) { 'medium' } else { 'low' }
$phase       = 'processing'
$processed   = 'true'
Write-Output "Processed iter=$iteration severity=$severity phase=$phase"

config.message: Disk out of bounds: used={{host.param.diskUsedPct}}% free={{host.param.diskFreeGB}}GB threshold={{trg-manual.param.threshold}}
OS is a Windows/Microsoft/Pro build matching ^10\\.: {{host.param.osName}} v{{host.param.osVersion}}
Collected host output AND machine is domain-joined: {{host.param.hostName}}
Host output contains no PANIC marker (safe)

data.label: Log: net up OR has gateway

data.label: Log: env starts prod OR stg

Lane TOP work complete, forwarding to sync-3
REST call failed after retries — falling back to SQL-only path

config.query: SELECT 1 AS n, 'ok' AS msg, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS ts
SELECT @env AS env, @host AS host, @thr AS threshold

MID deep combo matches AND contains

MID deep combo (ipv4 & gw set) OR 127.x

BOT timing phase done — fastest lane finished first
Runs even though upstream delay is disabled (via skip-cascade catch)
